message:
style: apply rustfmt and code style improvements across connectors and framework

Formatting and style cleanup with no logic changes:

- Break long import lines and function signatures for readability
- Adjust multi-line formatting in zendesk, google-calendar, s3, twilio,
  twitter connectors
- Apply clippy allow annotations in fcp-core provisioning tests
- Reformat e2e compliance tests (airtable, figma, microsoft365,
  vectordb, zendesk)
- Clean up fcp-oauth test formatting
- Update beads issue metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -958,7 +958,7 @@
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.1","title":"fcp.notion: Manifest + Capability Map (FCP2)","description":"# fcp.notion: Manifest + Capability Map (FCP2)

## Goal
Define the Notion connector manifest contract:
- archetypes (`knowledge`, `storage`, `operational`)
- operations + schema IDs
- capability families + per-operation caps
- NetworkConstraints allowlist

## Acceptance Criteria
- Complete manifest spec stored here.
- Good/bad manifest examples exist for static compliance.

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.2","title":"fcp.notion: Provisioning Automation (OAuth/token)","description":"# fcp.notion: Provisioning Automation (OAuth/token)

## Goal
Automate auth onboarding:
- OAuth token or internal integration token via `CredentialId`
- validate scopes and NetworkConstraints

## Acceptance Criteria
- `fcp doctor` validates readiness.
- Mockable.

Added NotionAuth enum (Token/CredentialId) with Clone+Debug(redacted)+redacted_label()+is_secretless(). NotionConfig with strict xor auth validation. handle_doctor() with 6 checks, handle_self_check() with credential_id degraded mode. health_check() via search endpoint. Updated main.rs dispatch. 11 provisioning tests + all 50 tests pass (27 unit + 23 integration), clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:29:36Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.3","title":"fcp.notion: Core Pages/Databases/Blocks","description":"# fcp.notion: Core Pages/Databases/Blocks

## Goal
Implement core operations:
- pages CRUD + children list/append
- databases CRUD + query
- blocks update/delete + children list/append

## Requirements
- Capability gated.
- Writes emit receipts/audit.
- Rate limits enforced.

## Acceptance Criteria
- The functionality described in this bead is implemented with typed schemas + validation (no unstructured “stringly” interfaces).
- Errors map to the FCP error taxonomy with correct retry semantics and no secret/PII leakage.
- Mock-only unit/integration tests cover success paths and common failures and emit structured JSON logs per `flywheel_connectors-1n78.35`.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"SunnyMoose","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-15T08:40:32.685029511Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-03-02T20:03:03.218868Z","closed_at":"2026-03-02T20:03:03.218855Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["connectors","fcp2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":505,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.3","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"SunnyMoose: Completed connector-level invoke integration tests for all 16 Notion operations. Added 13 new tests (create_page, update_page, delete_page, get_database, create_database, update_database, get_block, update_block, delete_block, get_block_children, append_blocks, add_comment, list_comments). All 76 tests pass, clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-03-02T20:02:59Z"},{"id":506,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.3","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"SunnyMoose: Completed Notion Core Pages/Databases/Blocks. Changes:
## New operations (6)
- notion.get_database — GET /v1/databases/:id
- notion.create_database — POST /v1/databases
- notion.update_database — PATCH /v1/databases/:id
- notion.get_block — GET /v1/blocks/:id
- notion.update_block — PATCH /v1/blocks/:id (content update)
- notion.delete_block — PATCH /v1/blocks/:id (archive)

## Implementation details
- Client methods with proper retry/error handling for all 6 new ops
- Connector invoke handlers with capability gating via CapabilityToken verification
- create_database validates required fields: parent, title, properties
- update_database accepts optional title, properties, description
- update_block strips block_id and forwards remaining content as PATCH body
- delete_block sets archived=true (soft delete, same as Notion API behavior)
- Typed Introspection catalog updated: 16 operations total (was 10)
- Manifest updated with all 6 new operations + network constraints + rate limits + AI hints
- Rate limit pool mapping updated for all new ops
- Interface hash regenerated

## Validation
- 76 tests pass (40 unit + 36 integration), clippy clean -D warnings, fmt clean
- New unit tests: get_database, create_database, update_database, get_block, update_block, delete_block (happy paths + not_found + missing fields)
- New connector tests: invoke validation for missing fields, introspect risk level verification
- Manifest golden vectors updated and passing (16 operations verified)","created_at":"2026-03-02T20:03:02Z"}]}
-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.4","title":"fcp.notion: Search (sensitive)","description":"# fcp.notion: Search (sensitive)

## Goal
Implement workspace search.

## Requirements
- Capability gated.
- Treat results as sensitive.
- Strong redaction.

## Acceptance Criteria
- The functionality described in this bead is implemented with typed schemas + validation (no unstructured “stringly” interfaces).
- Errors map to the FCP error taxonomy with correct retry semantics and no secret/PII leakage.
- Mock-only unit/integration tests cover success paths and common failures and emit structured JSON logs per `flywheel_connectors-1n78.35`.

All pass on remote worker. Clippy clean, fmt clean. Tests cover all 10 operations, error variants including Notion-unique Validation, capability verification.","created_at":"2026-03-02T10:09:40Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.6","title":"E2E: Notion Connector Compliance Run","description":"# E2E: Notion Connector Compliance Run

## Goal
Add Notion scenarios to the shared compliance harness.

## Scenarios
- Default deny.
- Allow with valid token.
- Network guard allow/deny.
- Writes emit receipts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo test --package fcp-e2e --features notion` passes deterministically.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-15T08:40:50.817230500Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-03-02T09:48:18.335327Z","closed_at":"2026-03-02T09:48:18.335314Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","connectors","e2e","fcp2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.6","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-e3i9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.6","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":471,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.6","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"E2E compliance tests for Notion connector created and passing.

File: crates/fcp-e2e/tests/notion_compliance_e2e.rs (3 tests)
1. notion_default_deny_compliance_suite_passes — token grants notion.write, invokes notion.get_page (needs notion.read) → denial
2. notion_allow_valid_token_connector_suite_passes — get_page against mock REST API (GET /pages/{id}) → success
3. notion_manifest_network_guard_allows_and_denies — all 10 operations verified against api.notion.com host_allow

Also updated crates/fcp-e2e/Cargo.toml: added notion feature + fcp-notion dev-dep.

Results: 3/3 passed, clippy clean (-D warnings), rustfmt clean (edition 2024).
Agent: SunnyMoose","created_at":"2026-03-02T09:48:14Z"}]}
